content.en:
He doesn't know much about the method of refining the soul will, but he can try it again and again, if it has an effect, he can clearly perceive it through this fragment of will, and if he studies it slowly in this way, there should be hope to study it.

Moreover, his multi-dimensional wisdom light and soul treasure bottle can improve understanding, and they are also the method that helps to create the will of the soul.

In this way, Ye Tian went all out in the following years to create the method of soul will refining.

From a little progress at the beginning, to more and more progress later, he has also studied enough on the method of soul will refining in his continuous research, and the efficiency of soul will refining has continued to skyrocket.

Finally, after spending more than 300 extradimensional eras, he successfully realized a relatively complete and quite good, and it was also the sixth version of the soul will refining method.

This method of refining the soul will, he named it the Rock Will Method!

Relying on the Rock Will Method, Ye Tian's soul will refining effect skyrocketed a hundredfold.

According to the current efficiency, at most, there will be another three hundred extradimensional epochs, and he will be able to refine this soul will of the replicating body to the seventh dimension.

And his real body copy body can also cultivate the Rock Will Method, but the effect is average, after all, there is no assistance from the Will Stone, that is, it is impossible to temper the soul will with the help of external forces, and no matter how good the soul will refining method is, it will not work ~ too good effect.

In these years, his soul will has not improved too much, but he has successfully practiced the second layer of the Three Wu Secret Method, and now he can completely control the second layer of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body and the Wu Mu Body, and perfectly exert the power of these two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, even if he fully exerts the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Learning-Sand and Gravel Tribulation, it will not have any impact.

It can be said that his strength has skyrocketed.

In terms of extradimensional rules, his progress is quite good, the current extradimensional rules have been increased to one hundred and twenty, and the realm of extradimensional rules has also improved slightly.

In the blink of an eye, more than three hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's third realm transcendent realm copy body finally refined the soul will to the seventh dimension.

Rumble!!!!

The first test was completed.

After this test is completed, a bunch of rewards emerge for him to pick one.

Most of the items he had seen before, but a few new treasures had appeared.

For example, the Will Dimension Gem, this treasure helps to temper the will.

Ye Tian took a look at the other treasures, and finally chose this Will Dimension Gem.

For the fourth realm, the most important thing is to improve the soul will, unless you don't want to become the fifth realm, then you can not care.

But if he wants to achieve the fifth realm, he must do his best to improve his soul will, and when he encounters this will dimensional gem, he naturally can't give up, even if the effect is not very good, as long as it is useful.

Wow!

This Will Dimension Gem fell into Ye Tian's hands, and he tried to refine his soul will, and immediately frowned.

The effect of this Will Dimension gem is very average, and it is estimated that when it reaches the eighth dimension, it is no longer useful.

And if you want to use it to raise the soul will to the eighth dimension, it will take endless years.

But it is only a reward obtained by passing the first test, and the value is naturally not too high, but it is still a priceless treasure for the ordinary fourth realm.

Soon, the second test came.

Please comprehend a seventh-dimensional will mastery

"The Seventh Dimension Will !!! Learning"

Ye Tian was shocked, the soul will also exists in the will of the will?

It was the first time he had heard of it.

But what can be imagined is that the Seventh Dimension Will Peerless Sect is definitely an incomparably terrifying Peerless Peerless Sect.

But he really didn't know anything about the seventh dimension of the will mastery now, and the difficulty of creating it was definitely very difficult.

Ye Tian muttered.

However, on the other side of the 5,000th Territory, the other Fourth Realms should have heard of the Will Peerless Sect, and perhaps they can trade some information about the Will Peerless Sect with them, and it is best to trade the Will's Peerless Inheritance, so it will be easier to pass this test.

......

Territory of 5,000.

Ye Tian came here with the cultivation of the fourth realm, first inquired about the fourth realm with a better temper, and then tried to trade with the other party.

Soon, he inquired about a fourth realm with a good temper.

The leader of the Green Alliance, the lord of the Qinya realm.

This Qinya Realm Lord is a mid-stage cultivator of the Fourth Realm, and his strength is not bad, but it is definitely not a top-notch Fourth Realm, and the Fourth Realm in the Five Thousand Realms can only be regarded as a medium level.

The Lord of the Qinya Realm often leaves the Five Thousand Realm, and occasionally returns.

The other party is definitely the right target.

So, Ye Tian came to visit this Qinya Realm Lord.

A visit from the Fourth Realm, this Qinya Realm Lord naturally would not refuse, and soon invited Ye Tian in.

Inside the dojo of the Lord of the Qinya Realm.

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Qinya Realm sat face to face, discussing and talking.

The Qinya Realm Lord was also more curious about Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian was a newcomer to the Fourth Realm, and he had almost no reputation before.

And Ye Tian's introduction to himself was that he had practiced penance before, and he finally broke through to the fourth realm by luck, but it did not arouse any suspicion.

After all, here in the 5,000th Territory, there are too many extradimensional realms at the peak of the third realm, and there are even ancient third realms that have been practicing ascetic retreat and seclusion for endless years!

The emergence of a new Fourth Realm is not a big deal.

After chatting for a while, Ye Tian finally said his purpose: "Qingya Realm Lord, do you have the will to inherit the Peerless Sect in your hands?"

"The !! of Willpower"

The Qinya Realm Lord stared at Ye Tian in surprise, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, I didn't expect you to know the Will Peerless Realm, here in the Five Thousand Territory, the newly promoted Fourth Realm and even many Fourth Realms who have never left, don't know what the Will Peerless Realm is at all. You may be disappointed, though. I don't have a mastery of will, and the will of every soul in the extradimensional realm is different, and even if I realize the mastery of will, it is not suitable for other extradimensional realms. The will mastery that is truly suitable for all extradimensional realms is afraid that only the fifth or even sixth realm can be created. Any inheritance of the will that can be learned by all extradimensional realms will be snatched up even by the fifth realm. "

"Will is so precious?"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised, he really underestimated the value of the will peerless learning.

The Qinya Realm Lord said again: "You even know the Absolute Knowledge, so you should also know that if you want to become the fifth realm, the soul will must reach the ninth dimension. And even if the soul will of the ninth dimension is reached, the attack power is actually not good. Even if you know the general will secret technique, it is difficult to hit the powerhouse of the same level, and only when the will means reach the will mastery, can you exert terrifying power. In short, the Will's Peerless Sect is terrifying, and it can even use the Will's Peerless Technique to bombard an extradimensional realm with multiple clones. Here in the 5,000th Territory, you don't want to get the Inheritance of the Will Peerless Learning, there is no more at all. "。
